testcase.name: test_websocket_connection_with_valid_token

failure.message: Failed: WebSocket connection failed: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:543: in __await_impl__ await self.connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:104: in handshake await asyncio.wait( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:428: in wait return await _wait(fs, timeout, return_when, loop) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:535: in _wait await waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:539: in __await_impl__ async with asyncio_timeout(self.open_timeout): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/timeouts.py:115: in __aexit__ raise TimeoutError from exc_val E TimeoutError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_websocket.py:81: in test_websocket_connection_with_valid_token async with websockets.connect(ws_url, close_timeout=5) as websocket: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:587: in __aenter__ return await self ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:578: in __await_impl__ raise TimeoutError("timed out during opening handshake") from exc E TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_websocket.py:87: in test_websocket_connection_with_valid_token pytest.fail(f"WebSocket connection failed: {str(e)}") E Failed: WebSocket connection failed: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.name: test_websocket_ping_pong

failure.message: Failed: Timeout waiting for pong response

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:543: in __await_impl__ await self.connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:104: in handshake await asyncio.wait( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:428: in wait return await _wait(fs, timeout, return_when, loop) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:535: in _wait await waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:539: in __await_impl__ async with asyncio_timeout(self.open_timeout): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/timeouts.py:115: in __aexit__ raise TimeoutError from exc_val E TimeoutError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_websocket.py:96: in test_websocket_ping_pong async with websockets.connect(ws_url, close_timeout=5) as websocket: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:587: in __aenter__ return await self ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:578: in __await_impl__ raise TimeoutError("timed out during opening handshake") from exc E TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_websocket.py:111: in test_websocket_ping_pong pytest.fail("Timeout waiting for pong response") E Failed: Timeout waiting for pong response

testcase.name: test_notification_broadcast_on_ticket_creation

failure.message: TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:543: in __await_impl__ await self.connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:104: in handshake await asyncio.wait( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:428: in wait return await _wait(fs, timeout, return_when, loop) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:535: in _wait await waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:539: in __await_impl__ async with asyncio_timeout(self.open_timeout): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/timeouts.py:115: in __aexit__ raise TimeoutError from exc_val E TimeoutError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_websocket.py:188: in test_notification_broadcast_on_ticket_creation async with websockets.connect(ws_url, close_timeout=10) as websocket: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:587: in __aenter__ return await self ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:578: in __await_impl__ raise TimeoutError("timed out during opening handshake") from exc E TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.name: test_multiple_ping_pong_cycles

failure.message: Failed: Multiple ping/pong test failed: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:543: in __await_impl__ await self.connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:104: in handshake await asyncio.wait( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:428: in wait return await _wait(fs, timeout, return_when, loop) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:535: in _wait await waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:539: in __await_impl__ async with asyncio_timeout(self.open_timeout): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/timeouts.py:115: in __aexit__ raise TimeoutError from exc_val E TimeoutError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_websocket.py:256: in test_multiple_ping_pong_cycles async with websockets.connect(ws_url, close_timeout=10) as websocket: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:587: in __aenter__ return await self ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:578: in __await_impl__ raise TimeoutError("timed out during opening handshake") from exc E TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_websocket.py:268: in test_multiple_ping_pong_cycles pytest.fail(f"Multiple ping/pong test failed: {str(e)}") E Failed: Multiple ping/pong test failed: timed out during opening handshake
